message:
Show pedal config in info command, fix box alignments

- Add PedalConfig to save/load programmed keys from ~/.config/savant-elite/pedals.conf
- savant info now shows current pedal configuration (or prompts to configure)
- Save config to disk after successful programming
- Simplify banner (remove large ASCII art for cleaner output)
- Standardize all box widths to 58 chars for consistent alignment
- Add dirs crate for cross-platform config directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
